description: Uniswap (UNI) emerged in 2020 as the governance token of Ethereum’s largest DEX, enabling protocol control, fee parameter voting, and treasury oversight. NOW on AtlantisChain — the world’s ONLY ultra-super-fast Layer-0 blockchain with 3,600,000 TPS and 0.031-second block time — ATC-20 UNI gives original UNI holders and traders instant finality, fixed ultra-low gas fee, and AI contract capability, turning it into a much faster, more secure and scalable asset in the Atlantis Kingdom.
name: Uniswap
